name: KKHTA Koishi and Yukari
description:
Unfortunately your the last human on earth but luckily an old hag and an idiot saved you from being murdered by any lunarians. Sorry you all I was grinding nfs heat… Based around the time of part 19. This one had been in my catalog for awhile I was working on it and never got back to it until recently it was originally supposed to come out when I hit 70 followers but so much time has past so I added more to it! Sorry for the long wait!

Tags ig: Touhou, KKHTA, Koishi, Yukari, Sad :(
